# mongolia-melbet.net

English-language landing pages for the Mongolia market covering sports, casino discovery, offers, FAQ guidance, and partnership routes.

## Canonical pages
- https://mongolia-melbet.net/ : homepage with sports, games, offers, and support links.
- https://mongolia-melbet.net/faq : player and partnership FAQ page with support contacts.
- https://mongolia-melbet.net/partnership : partner and agent route overview with contact options.

## Contact
- Email: PAYPARTNERS-MIDDLEAST@MELBET.COM
- Telegram: https://t.me/TeamCash_Mongolia
